title: Repaired distribution lane selector to gate manual-contact handoff on current contact discovery
repair_summary: Selector now prefers curator_contact_handoff_packet only when non-GitHub contact discovery is actually present, and otherwise falls back to distribution_reset. Reset-target promotion no longer overrides stronger selector branches prematurely.
expected_effect: Future marketing runs should stop wasting cycles on stale manual-contact handoff selection and should preserve fresher executable/reset lanes when contact-discovery proof is absent.
